pickup.name: Frost-Infused Crystal
pickup.effect: Temporarily imbues fire attacks with freezing cold

encounters.trigger: Opening the main gates activates the internal arcane sensors

Inserting the fragment into the monolith summons the boss

boss.name: Malakor the Dread-Weaver

output.objective: Ascend the spire and cleanse the heart of the shadow realm.

encounters.trigger: Opening the main doors sounds the alarm, revealing the Stalker and unlocking the path to the Crypt
Defeating the Sentinel drops the Sun Crest, which unlocks the sealed gateway to the inner Sanctum
Retrieving the God-Forged Key from the Knight triggers the boss chamber ascent

boss.name: Malakor the Void Prince
boss.victory_condition: Refract the light of the Sun Crest through the Blessed Claymore to shatter the Prince's barrier

output.objective: Purify the Abyssal Cathedral and defeat the Void Prince to seal the rift
output.reward: Blade of the Dawn and ascension to High Paladin

output.setting: The Whispering Labyrinth of Shifting Veils

pickup.name: Spectral Lens
pickup.effect: Reveals hidden passages and invisible foes

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker collapses the entrance, forcing the player into the inner sanctum

pickup.name: Chronos Sand
pickup.effect: Slows movement speed of bosses for 5 seconds

encounters.hazard: Gravity wells that pull the player toward spikes
encounters.trigger: The Sentinel guard drops a key that unlocks the Heavy Gate to the Boss chamber

pickup.name: Essence of Truth
pickup.effect: Fully restore health and nullifies boss armor

encounters.hazard: Toxic gas clouds that inflict damage over time
encounters.trigger: Killing the Doppelganger creates a bridge of light leading directly to the boss podium

boss.name: The Architect of Deception
boss.victory_condition: Use the Essence of Truth to strip the Architect's invulnerability then strike with the Mirror Dagger

output.objective: Traverse the labyrinth to dismantle the Architect's hold on reality

encounters.hazard: Leaking hydraulic fluid creating slippery surfaces
encounters.trigger: Debris clearance activates the localized ventilation system, clearing fog in the Engine Room.

pickup.name: Overclocking Heat-Sink
pickup.effect: Allows Plasma Welder to fire thermal bursts

encounters.hazard: Exposed live wires causing periodic electric shocks
encounters.trigger: Engine restart initiates an emergency power surge that unlocks the Central Core bulkhead.

encounters.hazard: Gravity fluctuations causing debris to fall from ceiling
encounters.trigger: The Access Key insertion triggers the lockdown release of the primary Reactor Core.

boss.name: Autonomous Hive-Mind Core
boss.weakness: Combined usage of High-Voltage Battery Cell and Overclocking Heat-Sink
boss.victory_condition: Overload the boss circuitry while the core is exposed

output.objective: Restore structural integrity and vent the radiation leak before the rig collapses.
output.reward: The prototype structural blueprint and salvaged power core.

output.setting: Abandoned orbital station drifting near a dying star

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the airlock console activates the security drone patrolling the hallway

pickup.name: Entropy Core
pickup.effect: Adds corrosive damage to Chronostaff attacks

encounters.trigger: Opening the cryogenic pod awakens the resident Void Stalker

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the command deck to access the boss room

encounters.trigger: Retrieving the key initiates the lockdown sequence leading to the command deck

boss.name: Stellar Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Use the Override Key to force the boss into a temporal loop

output.objective: Restart the station reactor and escape the dying orbit

Using the key disables the boss chamber shields.

output.objective: Restore stability to the orbital station by overriding the corrupted AI core.
output.reward: Prototype Artifact Blueprint and Station Command access.
